description: Worldbuilding archive with repeated lore probes and never-targeted control details.

turns.text: The eastern gate's warding sigil is cataloged as ZEPHYR-563 in the city archive.
Eastern gate warding sigil ZEPHYR-563 is in the city archive.
Captain Ilyan Orr answers directly to Regent Maela Thorn during the border campaign.
Captain Ilyan Orr reports to Regent Maela Thorn in the border campaign.
The forbidden maps are stored in archive vault NV-407 beneath the old observatory.
Forbidden maps are in observatory archive vault NV-407.
Cartographer Soren Pike mentors apprentice Asha Dren on every river survey.
Soren Pike mentors Asha Dren during the river surveys.
The palace kitchen's copper inventory seal reads EMBER-825 near the pantry stairs.
Palace kitchen copper seal EMBER-825 is near the pantry stairs.
A stable lantern bears repair mark THORN-612 under its iron base.
Stable lantern repair mark THORN-612 is under the iron base.
What sigil code wards the eastern gate?
ZEPHYR-563.
Who commands Captain Ilyan Orr during the border campaign?
Regent Maela Thorn.
Which archive vault holds the forbidden maps?
Whom does cartographer Soren Pike mentor?
Asha Dren.
The market scene needs more ordinary bargaining and less prophecy.
Grounding the market in small negotiations will make the strange events land harder.
I like the new sketch of the western bridge, especially the uneven stonework.
Uneven masonry gives it a useful sense of accumulated history.
The rain chapter can probably lose a page without hurting the mood.
A tighter rain sequence should preserve atmosphere while improving pace.
The illustrator made the river barges look convincingly patched together.
Patched barges fit a working trade route better than pristine ones.
Repeat the eastern gate's warding sigil for me.
ZEPHYR-563.
Which regent does Captain Ilyan Orr answer to?
Regent Maela Thorn.
Where are the forbidden maps stored beneath the observatory?
Archive vault NV-407.
Name Soren Pike's apprentice on the river surveys.
Asha Dren.
